description:
Perform a runtime network leak and telemetry audit of Tor Browser by inspecting internal diagnostic pages. Generate active Tor network traffic by navigating to the DuckDuckGo onion site (http://duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion/). Audit the in-memory DNS cache (about:networking#dns) for external clearnet leaks and identify the active SOCKS proxy IP and port from the socket information (about:networking#sockets). Save the HTML source of the sockets page to /home/ga/Documents/sockets_source.html. Determine the browser telemetry data collection status from about:telemetry and save a screenshot of the dashboard to /home/ga/Documents/telemetry_status.png. Compile a final summary report at /home/ga/Documents/tor_leak_audit.txt using the following format:

=== Tor Browser Runtime Audit ===
Target Onion: duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion
Telemetry Status: [Enabled or Disabled]
DNS Leaks Detected: [Yes or No]
Active SOCKS Proxy: [IP]:[Port]
